title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. vranjanum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. vranjanum, also known as a species of hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the liver and digestive system, making it useful in treating liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. vranjanum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparation of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. vranjanum is typically made into a tincture or infusion, and can be used to treat a range of conditions, from liver and gallbladder issues to digestive problems and skin conditions.
